reason: Agent successfully opened browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and returned the correct response within timeout.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Gamut application loaded successfully with agent list visible in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260708-205146-b7jn" agent button in sidebar — Agent page opened, showing agent configuration interface and message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." and submitted — Message sent successfully, agent began processing (status changed to "working")
Waited for agent response — Agent executed browser tools (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) and completed in 11 seconds
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Final response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." confirming successful browser navigation and page title extraction
